data.description: Iran's Supreme Leader: Iran to guard missile and nuclear tech like its borders.
Kimco Realty® reports Q1 2026 results with a net income of $75 million, surpassing analyst expectations.

data.title: Options Technology expands Financial Services Footprint with Major Tier 1 Bank AI Deployment in Iceland
data.description: Options Technology, a prominent player in financial technology managed services and IT infrastructure globally, revealed today that its PrivateMind solution has been chosen by a Tier 1 bank for a substantial AI project at its Iceland data center. PrivateMind, an AI platform tailored for financial institutions prioritizing data privacy, performance, and control, will be deployed in key locations with direct links to exchanges and liquid markets. This initiative signifies a significant step towards advanced AI usage within the financial sector.

data.title: Lilly reports first-quarter 2026 financial results, raises full year guidance, and highlights momentum of new medicines
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, there was a significant 56% surge in revenue totaling $19.8 billion, mainly fueled by increased sales volume. However, this growth was somewhat dampened by reduced prices from Mounjaro and Zepbound. Earnings per share (EPS) for Q1 2026 saw a substantial increase of 170% to $8.26 on a reported basis and rose by 156% to $8.55 on a non-GAAP basis.

data.title: Cardinal Health Reports Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Results and Raises Outlook
data.description: Cardinal Health reported a revenue growth of 11% to reach $60.9 billion. However, there was a 30% decrease in GAAP operating earnings, totaling $509 million, and a 20% decrease in GAAP diluted EPS, down to $1.69. On the flip side, non-GAAP operating earnings saw an 18% increase, amounting to $956 million, with non-GAAP diluted EPS rising by 35% to $3.17. The company announced its decision to raise and refine its fiscal year 2026 projections.

data.title: CNX Reports First Quarter Results
data.description: In Pittsburgh on April 30, 2026, CNX Resources Corporation (NYSE: CNX) unveiled its financial and operational performance for Q1 2026. The company shared these results on its website. The highlights include revenue reaching $X million, marking a Y% increase from the previous quarter. Additionally, net income for the quarter stood at $Z million. CNX's CEO expressed optimism about the company's trajectory and outlined strategic initiatives for the upcoming quarters. This disclosure follows a period of intensive planning and execution aimed at driving growth and profitability for CNX.

data.title: Hershey Reports First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Hershey, Pennsylvania, April 30, 2026 - The Hershey Company (NYSE: HSY) disclosed its financial performance for the first quarter that concluded on March 29, 2026. The company reported net sales and earnings for this period and confirmed its sales and earnings expectations for the full year of 2026. The company stated, "We had a robust start to the year and are progressing as planned towards achieving our financial objectives."

data.title: Nomad Foods Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Nomad Foods Limited (NYSE: NOMD) based in Woking, England, recently announced a declared cash dividend of $0.17 per share. This dividend is set to be paid on May 28, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of the end of business on May 12, 2026. Nomad Foods (NYSE: NOMD) is recognized as Europe's primary frozen food enterprise. With a diverse range of renowned brands such as Birds Eye, Findus, Iglo, Ledo, and Frikom, the company plays a significant role in consumers' meal choices.

data.title: Wolverine Worldwide Announces First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Conference Call for May 14, 2026
data.description: Wolverine World Wide, Inc. (NYSE: WWW) based in Rockford, Michigan shared its plan to release the first quarter fiscal 2026 financial results on Thursday, May 14, 2026, around 6:30 a.m. ET. A conference call will follow at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to delve into the results and address prevailing business trends. Interested investors and analysts can participate in the call by dialing 1-800-715-9871 (international participants dial 1-646-307-196).

data.title: TechnipFMC Announces First-Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: TechnipFMC plc (NYSE: FTI) released its first-quarter 2026 earnings report. In the three months ended March 31, 2026, the company reported revenue of $2.4927 billion, slightly down from $2.517 billion in the previous quarter but up by 11.6% compared to $2.2336 billion in the same period last year. Net income for the quarter was $260.5 million, higher than the $242.7 million reported in the previous quarter. The financial results include a reconciliation of U.S. GAAP to non-GAAP measures in the provided schedules.

data.title: Granite Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Granite (NYSE: GVA) released its first quarter 2026 results, reporting a net loss of $42 million, or $(0.96) per diluted share. This is compared to a net loss of $34 million, or $(0.77) per diluted share, in the same period last year. Adjusted net income attributable to Granite amounted to $12 million, or $0.26 per diluted share.

data.title: Sonic Automotive Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Charlotte, N.C., Sonic Automotive, Inc., a leading automotive retailer, announced its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company reported a 1% year-over-year increase in total revenues, reaching a record of $3.7 billion. Additionally, total gross profit for the first quarter also saw a record high at $598.8 million, reflecting a 6% increase compared to the previous year. Reported net income for the quarter was $X. Sonic Automotive operates as one of the largest automotive retailers in the nation, trading on the NYSE under the symbol SAH.

data.title: XPO Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Greenwich, Conn., on April 30, 2026, XPO revealed its first-quarter financial results. The company disclosed a rise in diluted earnings per share from $0.58 (in 2025) to $0.85, and adjusted diluted earnings per share climbed from $0.73 (in 2025) to $1.01. XPO is listed on the NYSE under the symbol XPO.

data.title: “barq” Launches Global Cross-Border QR Payments via Alipay+
data.description: In the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, the financial app barq recently introduced international cross-border QR payments in collaboration with Alipay+. This move comes as barq continues its rapid growth, emerging as one of the fastest-growing financial apps in the country. The partnership with Alipay+ aims to facilitate seamless transactions across borders, offering users a convenient and efficient way to make payments globally.

data.title: Butterfly Network Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Burlington, Massachusetts and New York, Butterfly Network, Inc. ("Butterfly" or the "Company"), a forefront player in semiconductor-based ultrasound technology, programmable cloud software, and AI, revealed its financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. Joseph DeVivo, the President, CEO, and Chairman of Butterfly, mentioned that the company had a robust start to the year with results exceeding expectations. Butterfly operates on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol BFLY.

data.title: Former Manulife CEO Roy Gori Joins Wellex as Strategic Advisor
data.description: Roy Gori, the former CEO of Manulife, has recently joined Wellex as their Strategic Advisor. This move showcases the company's swift expansion and commitment to revolutionizing women's health through evidence-based supplements and innovative approaches. This announcement was made in Toronto on April 30, 2026. Wellex is known for its dedication to enhancing women's health through scientific research and groundbreaking products.

data.title: Global Consumer Spending on Media & Tech Expected to Grow 3.7% in 2026, Accelerating From Only 2.8% in 2025, Fueled by Olympics, World Cup & Political Spend
data.description: According to recent research, consumer spending on media content and technology worldwide increased by 2.8% in 2025, reaching a total of $2.439 trillion. This growth rate marked a slowdown from the 4.4% rise seen in 2024. The deceleration was attributed to the absence of significant global sporting events and a decrease in federal elections and associated media purchases.
